ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the county information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_demographics" (
  "age_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "age_0_to_14" INTEGER /* Population aged 0 to 14 */,
  "age_15_to_19" INTEGER /* Population aged 15 to 19 */,
  "age_20_to_29" INTEGER /* Population aged 20 to 29 */,
  "age_30_to_54" INTEGER /* Population aged 30 to 54 */,
  "age_55_to_64" INTEGER /* Population aged 55 to 64 */,
  "age_65_plus" INTEGER /* Population aged 65 and older */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES demographic_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population record */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the population trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES demographic_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county for which data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., demographic, trend) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year of the external data */,
  "population_data" INTEGER /* Total population from the external data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the external data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES demographic_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been addressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "age_demo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age demographic record */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the demographic data */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_versioning_age_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_demo_id") REFERENCES age_demographics ("age_demo_id")
)
